description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a blue and black color scheme accented by a gold Imperial Aquila insignia on the receiver. The body is constructed from robust metal with a matte finish, and the fore-end has ribbed grip panels for secure handling. The magazine is detachable and extends below the receiver, while the rear of the weapon is fitted with a pistol grip and a short, angular stock. The top of the receiver has a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and the muzzle is reinforced with a cylindrical barrel shroud. Notably, the rear of the shotgun displays a gold skull motif, adding a distinctive, ornate touch.
description: A compact, blue and black tactical shotgun with a gold insignia, ribbed fore-end, detachable magazine, and ornate gold skull detail at the rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue receiver, gold Aquila insignia, ribbed fore-end, detachable magazine, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rail system, barrel alignment, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the gold skull detail at the rear, the magazine, and the overall angular design.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the gold skull motif, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a cylindrical shroud and ribbed fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
